Enter basic details: Shop name, owner name, address, and GPS location. Provide business info: Shop type, brand (optional), and experience. Set up payments: Add UPI ID (optional) and bank details. Upload verification: ID proof or shop photo (optional). Configure delivery: Choose self delivery and/or platform delivery. Add products: Select items (20L/10L), set price, and update stock.

Late delivery ⏱️ Bad quality 💧 Damage / Leak 🧯 Extra money asked 💰 Wrong item 📦

delievry man uplaod
 live image delievry gan

👤 Customer → Customer Referral

  • User A refers User B
  • On signup → User A gets +20 points
  • On first order →
    • User A gets +30 points
    • User B gets +20 points (welcome)

🏪 Customer → Shop Referral

  • User A refers Shop B
  • On shop approval → User A gets +50 points
  • After first 5 orders → User A gets +100 points

Plan: ₹99/month

Benefits:
- Free delivery (≥ ₹99)
- 2% auto discount
- 3 coupons/month (₹20 OFF)
- +10% loyalty points

🔁 4. Auto-Renew Subscription Auto renew every 30 days ✔ Logic: IF auto_renew = ON: auto charge user ELSE: expire plan
👉 Use payment gateway support (like Razorpay)

Admin:
Create Categories
Create  subCategories

Shop:
Add Products under Category
Set Price & Stock

Admin:
Monitor / Control
